title: Ternatea pedunculata
taxonomy: Ternatea pedunculata is classified as a species within the plant family Gesneriaceae. This family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the African violet or streptocarpus family. The genus Ternatea is part of a larger group called the Gesneriaceae family, which also includes other genera like Streptocarpus and Saintpaulia. The classification of Ternatea pedunculata can also be further broken down into its kingdom, phylum, class, order, and family levels. However, the exact classification of Ternatea pedunculata is not well-documented in widely available sources.
